title: Gujarat HC bars AI use for adjudication, verdicts
description: The Gujarat high court prohibits AI in judicial decisions, ensuring judges remain responsible for rulings, while allowing limited AI use for administrative tasks.

title: AI Innovation's New Reality: Adapting to the Accelerating Pace
description: Organizations face a new reality where AI is a baseline expectation, but their capacity to absorb it hasn't kept pace. The article discusses how leaders must adapt to the fast-paced innovation driven by AI, focusing on empowering people, building trust, and embracing change to overcome challenges and unlock AI's potential.

title: BNB Price Prediction: White House AI Plan Boosts Pepeto’s Smart Money Edge
